functions.name: withPostgres
functions.returns: An updated resource builder with Postgres integration configured for the Keycloak resource.
functions.signature: withPostgres(database: PostgresDatabaseResource, username?: ParameterResource, password?: ParameterResource, xaEnabled?: boolean): KeycloakResource

parameters.name: database
parameters.description: The resource builder for the Postgres database that Keycloak will connect to.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: (Optional) The resource builder for the parameter defining the database username. If not provided, the parent database resource's username parameter will be used.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: (Optional) The resource builder for the parameter defining the database password. If not provided, the parent database resource's password parameter will be used.

parameters.name: xaEnabled
parameters.description: A boolean flag indicating whether XA transactions are enabled. Defaults to false.
